text: TCAF: I Remain A Skeptic Owing To Mostly Disappointing Performance, Factor Mix. text: Nomura: IB Could Recover In Ebullient Q1, Macquarie Integration Costs Will Pass. Temporary acquisition-related costs from the Macquarie deal will pressure profits through the next year, but underlying asset management inflows and alternative AUM growth remain robust. text: Cloudflare: Developer Platform Driving Stronger Growth. Cloudflare's 2025 revenue grew 30%, driven by rapid customer expansion, especially from its Developer Platform, though ARPU declined due to lower-spending developer customers. The company's P/S multiple is recalibrated to 16.0x based on subindustry growth trends, factoring in a 5-year forward revenue CAGR of 29.5% and ongoing share dilution. Key risks include competition from cloud hyperscalers, but long-term upsell opportunities exist as developer customers scale and potentially increase spending.
